future northern White Bear clan craftsman and shield-guard continuity reference
costume and prop handoff for white bear fur mantle, black iron chest band, snow-forge tool chain, ember seed jar, leather apron, bronze bracers, repair tools, and great shield

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
The Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem is locked; do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Tuoba Yanxiong logo, shield emblem, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, or modern mark.
Use the existing Wanshou system only as material and object-symbol language: bonewood knots, rawhide cord, wind-worn bone, oath cord, and tiny tool tokens.

Tuoba Yanxiong must read as a 30-40-year-old White Bear clan snow-forge craftsman and shield-guard, not a noble shaman, not a generic breacher, not a cute bear mascot, not a human wearing bear ears, and not a full animal.

Preserve the broad upright bear body, short wide muzzle, round bear ears, shield-like chest, huge forearms, white bear fur, black iron chest band, leather apron, snow-forge tool chain, ember seed jar, bronze bracers, rough repair tools, and large plain great shield.
Costume can be wind-worn, snow-dusted, and ember-scorched at apron edges, but must stay functional, readable, and craft-specific.
Low magic is not a combat visual for this character; no attack magic, large aura, blue-purple glow, or spell circle.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
